scripts.build: bun build src/main.ts --outdir dist --target node --define PODKIT_VERSION="'$(jq -r .version package.json)'" && bun run build:types
scripts.test:unit: FILES=$(find src -name '*.test.ts' ! -name '*.integration.test.ts' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILES" ] && bun test $FILES || echo 'No unit tests found'
scripts.test:integration: FILES=$(find src -name '*.integration.test.ts' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILES" ] && bun test $FILES || echo 'No integration tests found'
